1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: Cast sorcerer spells using Charisma. Know a fixed list of spells (no preparing) and cantrips.

1.name: Sorcerous Origin
1.description: Choose the source of your innate magic: Draconic Bloodline, Wild Magic, Divine Soul, Shadow Magic, Storm Sorcery, Aberrant Mind, Clockwork Soul, or others.

2.name: Font of Magic
2.description: Sorcery Points pool = Sorcerer level. Restore on long rest. Convert slots to points (Flexible Casting) or points to slots.

3.name: Metamagic
3.description: Choose two Metamagic options: Careful, Distant, Empowered, Extended, Heightened, Quickened, Seeking, Subtle, Transmuted, or Twinned Spell. Gain two more at level 17.

20.name: Sorcerous Restoration
20.description: Regain 4 expended Sorcery Points whenever you finish a short rest.
